diagrams.title: C Language Application Domains
diagrams.description: A hierarchical diagram showing major domains where C programming is applied
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the breadth of C applications in computing

diagrams.title: C as Bridge Language
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing C's position between low-level assembly and high-level languages
elements: MIDDLE: C Language (Pointers, bitwise ops, portable)
ARROWS: C compilers translate to assembly, other language interpreters written in C
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing C as a middle-level language bridging hardware and software abstraction
